title: AL's Ghasts Revamped
description: A pack that revamps the Ghast and Happy Ghast and adds more variants!
body:
![Ghasts Revamped Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a86380a4614998aaad6fcce8209e1260f90e4db5.png)

# 

A pack that revamps the Ghast and Happy Ghast and adds more variants by changing the models and textures!

I made this as a more "Vanilla style" pack while still giving them a well needed revamp.

 

This pack gives both the Ghast and Happy Ghast improved, pixel-consistent, textures.

It also gives the Ghast multiple model variants based on A Minecraft Movie and concept art from Minecraft Legends!

The Ghast variants are also compatible with my other pack, AL's Piglins Revamped.

 

 

Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality
